verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Don’t you want to go with Him to glory land? Don’t you want to be found of that heavenly land? Don’t you want to be with Jesus some wonderful day? Sharing His glory; then watch and pray.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Watch and pray if you would enter in, Watch and pray that you be free from sin Our Lord is coming to catch His bride away If you want to go with Him Then watch and pray,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now you better be repenting from all your sins Ask the Holy Spirit to dwell within Live a holy life, from day to day Waiting for His coming, then watch and pray.
